description: Combined CLI for multiple API services

tools.name: bootstrap-static_get
tools.description: ~1.5MB. The single most important read in the FPL API. Loaded once and cached locally for all entity lookups.

tools.name: dream-team_get
tools.description: Highest-scoring XI for a gameweek. Required: eventId.

tools.name: element-summary_get
tools.description: Per-player detail (history + upcoming fixtures). Required: elementId.

tools.name: elite-json_get-elite-aggregates
tools.description: Aggregated picks, captaincy %, ownership, and chip usage among the top 10,000 ranked managers. ~10KB, refreshed each gameweek.

tools.name: entry_get
tools.description: Manager profile (name, country, leagues, summary score). Required: managerId.

tools.name: entry_event_get-entry-picks
tools.description: Manager picks for a specific gameweek. Required: managerId, eventId.

tools.name: entry_history_get-entry
tools.description: Manager history (per-GW score, past seasons, chips). Required: managerId.

tools.name: entry_transfers_get-entry
tools.description: Manager transfers (all transfers this season). Required: managerId.

tools.name: event_live_get-event
tools.description: Live gameweek stats (per-player points and explain breakdown). Required: eventId.

tools.name: event-status_get
tools.description: Bonus and league update status across active GW.

tools.name: fixtures_get
tools.description: All season fixtures (optionally filtered by event). Optional: event, future.

tools.name: games-json_get-live-games
tools.description: Array of arrays — one per Premier League fixture in the active gameweek. Each entry: [home, away, hscore, ascore, status, source, h_scorers, h_assists, a_scorers, a_assists, bps_top, ..., per-player live entries with BPS, minutes, clean sheets, bonus]. Update frequency: ~1-2 min during live matches. Optional: _.

tools.name: leagues-classic_standings_get-classic-league
tools.description: Classic league standings (paginated). Required: leagueId. Optional: page_standings, page_new_entries.

tools.name: leagues-h2h-matches_get-h2h-league-matches
tools.description: H2H league matches. Required: leagueId.

tools.name: lh-api2_get-planner-snapshot
tools.description: Returns FT, bank, chips_available, base_gw, eleven, picks, benches, bought_values per element_id, manager_name, original picks (start of GW), epicks (effective picks after auto-subs). Used by LiveFPL's transfer planner UI. Required: id.

tools.name: xfplapi_get-live-team
tools.description: THE primary LiveFPL transcendence endpoint. Returns: - GWrank: current gameweek rank - GWrank2: projected/secondary rank - a_e / a_o / a_t: average scores (entry/overall/top tiers) - arrow_*: visual rank-direction indicators - avg_similarity: how template the team is - bench, benchzz: bench points + bench element_ids - buds: similar-manager comparisons - cache: cache key - calcplayerptsd: live calculated points per element_id - and ~40 more fields Single endpoint per team; ~80KB. Public, no auth. Required: teamId.

tools.name: locals-league-id-json_get-league-locals-snapshot
tools.description: Available for indexed (popular) leagues; small leagues 404 here and must use the dynamic livefplapi path on www.livefpl.net. Required: leagueId.

tools.name: me_get
tools.description: Authenticated user's own profile. (requires API key)

tools.name: my-team_get
tools.description: Requires a session cookie from a logged-in fantasy.premierleague.com session. Opt-in only; we surface this behind a `--with-auth` flag and an env var (PP_FPL_SESSION_COOKIE) so accidental agent loops cannot trigger it. Required: managerId. (requires API key)

tools.name: prices-json_get-prices
tools.description: Dict keyed by FPL element_id. Each value: {name, team, type (GK/DEF/MID/FWD), type_code, team_code, cost, progress, progress_tonight, per_hour}. Used by LiveFPL's price-change predictor.

tools.name: team_get-set-piece-notes
tools.description: Set-piece taker notes per club.

tools.name: top-transfers-json_get-top-transfers
tools.description: Array of [out_player_id, in_player_id, count_million, pct_share]. Sorted descending by volume. Updated every few minutes during transfer windows.

tools.name: version-json_get-version
tools.description: Returns {gen, version, meter, store, league}. `gen` increments every time LiveFPL's backend re-aggregates; clients use it as a cache key.
